body:
We're bringing you in on our state of the race. We respectfully ask that you do not share this.
Hello,
You're one of Senator Hassan's best supporters, so we're bringing you in on our state of the race. **Please do not share -- it's very important that this information stays close-hold.**
Here's what you need to know:
* Maggie only ousted far-right Republican Kelly Ayotte by 1,017 votes in the closest Senate race of 2016.
* Ayotte is considering a rematch, and corporate special interests will spend big to flip this seat back to the GOP.
* The Senate majority comes down to this extremely vulnerable Senate seat.

Look, like we said, you're one of Maggie's most valued supporters. The campaign's first fundraising deadline of 2021 is just a few days away, and she really needs your support. [**Will you please kick in $3 or however much you can so that we can end January strong and protect this vulnerable Senate seat -- and the Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7e7/2a380d31/219139f2/f052d8/2373098919/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDEyOV9tZW1vX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210129_memo_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Corruption Update
body:
Clinton Emails and the Supreme Court

[INSIDE JW]

AMERICA NEEDS TO KNOW THE TRUTH ABOUT BIDEN FAMILY'S CORRUPTION

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21932&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1qNmc5T1hyUnVlMCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]

The Biden scandals didn’t disappear when Joe Biden entered the Oval
Office, as I wrote
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21933&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvamFuLzI3L2FtZXJpY2EtbmVlZHMtdG8ta25vdy10aGUtdHJ1dGgtYWJvdXQtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
in this op-ed for _The Washington Times_:

A president takes office amidst charges of family corruption and shady
business dealings with a country connected to interfering in the very
election that put him in the White House. Sound familiar?

The false narrative that Democrats concocted to hobble the Trump
administration four years ago is now the real deal with Joe Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
and his family.
And unlike President Trump
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21935&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==],
who faced
unprecedented institutional resistance and Deep State resistance,
President Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
can likely count on the Justice Department
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
and
the media to allow him to escape meaningful scrutiny.

Judicial Watch recently started a petition at Change.org asking the
Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
immediately to appoint a special counsel to investigate Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
family dealings in
China
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21937&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1],
Ukraine and
other countries. There is substantial evidence, from documents and
witness statements, that the Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
family, including
President Joe Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==],
may have been
involved in criminal activity with foreign entities tied to Ukraine
and China
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21937&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1].
In just a
few days the petition has garnered nearly 200,000 signatures.

Judicial Watch uncovered documents that show even as far back as the
Obama administration Russia-linked media in Ukraine were
“trolling” Joe Biden
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21934&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3Mvam9lLWJpZGVuLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
over “his
son’s business.” Mr. Biden’s son Hunter has acknowledged that he
is the target of an FBI criminal investigation. Any investigation
should involve alleged money laundering, influence peddling and tax
violations among other shady activities.

A special counsel is required because the Justice Department
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
and
its FBI are conflicted in investigating any matters that could
implicate the president and/or his immediate family in criminal
activity. As Republican Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas said recently,
“if there were ever circumstances that create a conflict of interest
and call for a special counsel, that’s here.” Justice Department
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
regulations that were abused to appoint a special counsel to harass
then-President Trump
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21935&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
actually do
fairly apply to the Biden situation. A special counsel is required by
Justice regulations when:

(a) That investigation or prosecution of that person or matter by a
United States Attorney’s Office or litigating Division of the
Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
would
present a conflict of interest for the Department
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21936&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1vZi1qdXN0aWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
or
other extraordinary circumstances; and

(b) That under the circumstances, it would be in the public interest
to appoint an outside Special Counsel to assume responsibility for the
matter.

The matter is urgent. Americans just learned that communist China
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21937&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
was actively involved
in the 2020 presidential election. Director of National Intelligence
John Ratcliffe, in a letter transmitted to Congress, concluded that
“based on all available sources of intelligence, with definitions
consistently applied, and reached independent of political
considerations or undue pressure — that the People’s Republic of
China sought to influence the 2020 U.S. federal elections.”

Chinese efforts to interfere in the 2020 election might have been
better known before election days but for Deep State resistance.
Intelligence Community Ombudsman Barry Zulauf found that CIA analysts
were reluctant to reveal China’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21937&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
malign actions because
they were opposed to the Trump administration, and were “saying in
effect, I don’t want our intelligence used to support those
policies.” In fact, “strong efforts” were made last summer to
suppress analysts who wanted to expose the full range of Chinese
efforts to swing the election to Mr. Biden.

We are already seeing China
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21937&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS90b3BpY3MvY2hpbmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
indirectly benefitting
from Biden policies. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline will divert
Canadian oil west to the petroleum-hungry People’s Republic.
Re-entering the Paris Climate Agreement gives political cover to
China’s

SENATOR ASKS IRS TO STRIP CONSERVATIVE GROUP OF NONPROFIT STATUS

One of the scandals of the Obama administration thrown down the memory
hole was the use of the IRS to target political opponents. Not
surprisingly, that tactic is coming back in the administration of
Obama’s underling. Our_ Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21939&F=T&]
of this renewed misuse of the IRS:

Reminiscent of the Obama Internal Revenue Service’s (IRS) witch hunt
of conservative groups, a U.S. Senator who sits on the committee that
oversees the tax agency is pushing it to revoke a student charity’s
nonprofit status. The veteran lawmaker, Rhode Island Democrat Sheldon
Whitehouse, says the conservative student organization, Turning Point
USA
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHB1c2EuY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==],
should lose its nonprofit rating because
it held large events that could help spread COVID-19. In a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21941&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5zZW5hdGUuZ292L2ltby9tZWRpYS9kb2MvV2hpdGVob3VzZUlSU0xldHRlcnJlVHVybmluZ1BvaW50VVNBLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
to IRS Commissioner Charles P. Rettig the senator describes the
gatherings as “superspreader” events. He specifically mentions a
Palm Beach, Florida winter gala at the Mar-a-Lago Club famously owned
by former President Donald Trump.

“According to press reports and social media posts, many
participants gathered and mingled indoors without wearing masks, in
violation of Palm Beach County’s COVID-19 regulations,”
Whitehouse, a member of the Senate Finance Committee
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21942&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmluYW5jZS5zZW5hdGUuZ292L2Fib3V0L21lbWJlcnNoaXA/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMzAwMTQ3MjU=],
writes to the IRS
chief. The powerful chamber has oversight over the IRS, among many
other government agencies. “In holding these ‘superspreader’
events, Turning Point USA knowingly exposed hundreds of young people
and staff working at the events to serious risk of infection,” the
letter continues. The legislator asks the IRS to review whether the
group, which has more than 250,000 student members, should continue to
enjoy its tax-exempt nonprofit status. “Established law has long
held that an organization is not eligible for tax exemption under
section 501(c)(3) if a purpose of the organization is contrary to
public policy or is illegal,” the letter states, reminding the IRS
commissioner of a three-part test established to determine whether an
organization’s activities are consistent with tax exemption under
the code.

The analysis includes determining whether the purpose of the
organization is charitable, if activities are not illegal and whether
the activities are in furtherance to the group’s exempt purpose and
are reasonably related to that purpose. “Turning Point USA’s
reckless decision to host potential ‘superspreader’ events, in
open violation of local COVID-19 regulations, put children and others
at risk, and was clearly contrary to the public good,” the senator
tells the IRS commissioner. “Tax-exempt status provides a
substantial benefit to charitable organizations and reflects the
federal government’s endorsement of an organization’s activities.
Organizations that knowingly put in danger minors entrusted to their
care should not enjoy the benefits of tax-exempt status. Accordingly,
I urge the IRS to review whether it should revoke Turning Point
USA’s tax-exempt status.”

Founded in 2012, Turning Point USA describes itself as a national
student movement dedicated to identifying, organizing, and empowering
young people to promote the principles of free markets and limited
government. The group’s founder, 27-year-old Charlie Kirk, was the
chairman of Students for Trump, which aimed to activate a million new
college voters before the 2020 presidential election. In a press
release
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21943&F=T&]
announcing the letter to the IRS, Whitehouse refers to the group as a
“right-wing nonprofit” that “promotes far-right ideas to young
people around the country.” The document, posted on the senator’s
official website, further states that Turning Point USA “has
cultivated close ties to President Trump and the Trump family.”

The senator’s push to repeal the conservative charity’s nonprofit
status brings back memories of the Obama IRS singling out groups with
conservative-sounding terms such as “patriot” and “Tea Party”
in their titles when applying for tax-exempt benefits. Judicial Watch
launched an investigation and sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21944&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL3RheC1leGVtcHQtc3RhdHVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
for records
after an explosive Treasury Inspector General report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=8328&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy50cmVhc3VyeS5nb3YvdGlndGEvYXVkaXRyZXBvcnRzLzIwMTNyZXBvcnRzLzIwMTMxMDA1M2ZyLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
revealed that in 2010 the IRS began using inappropriate criteria, such
as lists of past and future donors, to identify organizations applying
for tax-exempt status. The illegal IRS reviews continued for more than
18 months, according to the report, and “delayed processing of
targeted groups’ applications” preparing for the 2012 presidential
election. The IRS director at the center of the scheme, Lois Lerner,
not only broke agency rules—as well as the law—to target
conservative organizations she also lied to Congress to cover up the
wrongdoing.

BALLOT HARVESTING LEGAL BATTLE: JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO
UPHOLD ARIZONA’S ELECTORAL INTEGRITY LAWS

The legal battles for clean and fair elections continue – and
Judicial Watch is front and center advocating for election integrity.

We joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) in filing
an _amici curiae_ (friends of the court) brief
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21917&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jybm92aWNoLWV0LWFsLXYtZG5jLWV0LWFsLXNjb3R1cy1icmllZi1hei0xMjU3LTEyNTgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
with the U.S. Supreme Court to uphold Arizona’s electoral integrity
laws that prohibit out-of-precinct voting and ballot harvesting.

We submitted the brief in the case _Mark Brnovich, Attorney General of
Arizona, et al. v. Democratic National Committee, et al._
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21945&F=T&]
(Nos. 19-1257 & 1258), coming on appeal from the U.S. Circuit Court of
Appeals for the Ninth Circuit. Initially, a Ninth Circuit panel of
judges affirmed the district court ruling upholding Arizona’s
election integrity laws that prohibit out-of-precinct voting and
ballot harvesting, but then the full appeals court overturned the
district court ruling. The Ninth Circuit held that Arizona’s
prohibition on out-of-precinct voting and third-party collection and
delivery of early ballots (ballot harvesting) were enacted with a
discriminatory purpose and had discriminatory results, in violation of
Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The Supreme Court granted
a writ of certiorari to hear the appeal on April 27, 2020.

Our brief explains that in applying the Voting Rights Act:

[C]ourts ask whether the evidence indicates that the challenged voting
procedures have caused minority voters to have less opportunity to
participate in the political process and to elect representatives of
their choice. Respondents utterly failed to adduce any evidence that
satisfied this ... requirement of causation, i.e., that the
challenged voting procedure caused minorities to have less
opportunity to participate in the political process and to elect
representatives of their choice.

This Supreme Court case highlights how leftist partisans would misuse
civil rights laws to undermine election integrity measures, such as a
ban on ballot harvesting, that are race neutral.

In 2020, we sued North Carolina
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=18485&F=T&],
Pennsylvania
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=18726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1wYS12b3RpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1],
and
Colorado
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=20868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY28tdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
for
failing to clean their voter rolls, and sued Illinois
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=20594&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaWxsaW5vaXMtcmVmdXNlcy12b3Rlci1yb2xsLWRhdGEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
for
refusing to disclose voter roll data in violation of federal law.
These lawsuits are ongoing. We also have several dozen open records

You can learn more about our clean election efforts here

JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO REQUIRE CLINTON EMAIL TESTIMONY

The Clinton email scandal is one of the most dramatic illustrations of
the two-tiered justice system here in Washington, DC. If it weren’t
for Judicial Watch, the scandal would have been completely suppressed
by the corrupt Justice and State Departments.

We just asked the U.S. Supreme Court to take up our challenge
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21920&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtc2NvdHVzLWhyYy1lbWFpbHMtMDEyNDItNTA1Ni8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMzAwMTQ3MjU=]
to
an appeals court order exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under
oath about her emails.

We argue in our petition for a _writ of
certiorari_ (“cert petition”) that the court should hear our
case because the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia
Circuit erred in giving Clinton unwarranted special treatment that
conflicts both with Supreme Court precedent and the precedents of
other courts of appeal, including its own.

This cert petition arises from our FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=20921&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc2Vla3MtZnVsbC1jb3VydC1yZXZpZXcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1]
(_Judicial
Watch v. U.S. Department of State_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=17924&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzLzA5LTA5LTE0LWp3LXYtc3RhdGUtMDEyNDItYmVuZ2hhemktcmljZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMzAwMTQ3MjU=]
(No.
1:14-cv-01242), which led directly
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=15727&F=T&]
to
the disclosure of Clinton’s use of a nongovernment email server to
conduct government business. On March 2, 2020, U.S. District Court
Judge Royce Lamberth authorized
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=17946&F=T&]
us
to depose Clinton about her emails and the existence of relevant
Benghazi attack documents. The court also ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=17923&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc3RhdGUtaGlsbGFyeS1kZXBvc2l0aW9uLW9yZGVyLTAxMjQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
the
deposition of Clinton’s former Chief of Staff, Cheryl Mills, and two
other State Department officials.

Clinton and Mills filed an emergency writ of mandamus appeal to
avoid testifying. On August 31, 2020, the D.C. Court of Appeals
granted Clinton’s petition for mandamus relief, allowing her to
avoid giving sworn testimony in our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=15644&F=T&].

As we argue in our cert petition, granting Clinton this extraordinary
relief flies in the face of the D.C. Circuit’s own precedent, most
recently in the Michael Flynn case, who, unlike Clinton, was denied
mandamus relief.
We also argue that the appellate decision allowing Hillary Clinton to
avoid testimony dramatically undermines the Freedom of Information
Act:

In effect, it eliminates any discovery into the actions of agency
officials or employees other than FOIA officers – walling off from
any inquiry officials or employees who may be less than honest with
FOIA officers or who might seek to conceal agency records from FOIA
officers to prevent disclosure to the public, among other matters
plainly relevant to an agency’s good faith in responding to FOIA
requests.

***

It is especially important that this misapplication of longstanding
precedent be corrected because the D.C. Circuit’s far-reaching
decision will nullify the “citizens’ right to be informed about
‘what their government is up to’” and for all intents and
purposes, it will eradicate the district courts’ role as the
enforcement arm of FOIA, as Congress intended.

No court should undermine the Freedom of Information Act and the rule
of law by giving Hillary Clinton special protection from having to
testify about her emails. The Supreme Court should cast politics aside
and affirm that Hillary Clinton is not above the law.

SOROS-FUNDED GROUP TO PROVIDE ‘MANDATORY IMPLICIT BIAS TRAINING’
FOR L.A. CITY WORKERS

California has become a playground for radical leftists. Our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21946&F=T&]
their latest schemes to undermine the rule of law:

Billionaire George Soros’s radical leftism is spreading through
America’s most populous county. Days after a Soros-backed
prosecutor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=20661&F=T&]
who
vows to lock up fewer criminals became Los Angeles District Attorney,
the city’s mayor is forcing all employees to undergo “implicit
bias
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGFtYXlvci5vcmcvbWF5b3ItZ2FyY2V0dGktYW5ub3VuY2VzLW1hbmRhdG9yeS1pbXBsaWNpdC1iaWFzLXRyYWluaW5nLWNpdHktZW1wbG95ZWVzXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==
training to be conducted by a group that receives funding from Soros
and his Open Society Foundations (OSF). That makes L.A. County and its
biggest city, the nation’s second-most populous, a stronghold of the
powerful Soros machine that aims to promote the left’s agenda.

It started with Soros’s financial support for a controversial Black
Lives Matter-endorsed District Attorney candidate, George Gascon, who
has alienated career prosecutors throughout California with his
renegade criminal justice reform initiatives. A former San Francisco
District Attorney, Gascon announced upon being sworn in as L.A.
County’s top prosecutor that his office will no longer pursue the
death penalty, try juveniles as adults, add gangs and other
enhancements to criminal complaints or seek cash bail for non-violent
felonies or misdemeanors.

It is worth noting that the L.A. County D.A. is the largest local
prosecutorial office in the United States. The District Attorney in
Sacramento recently blasted Gascon in a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21948&F=T&]
published
by various media outlets in the state. “Your Special Directives are
not just extreme but will undoubtedly wreak havoc on crime victims and
their Constitutional rights,” the letter states. “Your lack of
concern for their rights and safety concerns me greatly. Additionally,
because crime has no boundaries, these Special Directives will have
far greater impact than on Los Angeles County alone. Rather, victims
across California will be negatively impacted and the safety of all
Californians will be jeopardized.”

Now all the city’s 50,000 employees must participate in racial bias
training conducted by the Kirwan Institute for the Study of Race and
Ethnicity
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21949&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9raXJ3YW5pbnN0aXR1dGUub3N1LmVkdS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMzAwMTQ3MjU=]
at Ohio State University
(OSU). Judicial Watch dug up information on the group and uncovered
deep ties to Soros and other notorious leftists. The center is named
after a former OSU president appointed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21950&F=T&]
by California Congresswoman Nancy Pelosi to a prestigious Department
of Education post. In addition to its “implicit bias” trainings,
the institute’s research areas include racial wealth inequality,
opportunity mapping, and health equity and disparities. As you would
expect, its agenda is radically progressive. Policy proposals from
Kirwan Institute products include, “significantly raise taxes on the
ultra-wealthy,” a Congressional committee on reparations, guaranteed
employment, and “Medicare for All.”

Until this month, the institute’s executive director was Darrick
Hamilton
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21951&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9raXJ3YW5pbnN0aXR1dGUub3N1LmVkdS9tZWRpYS1yZWxlYXNlcy9raXJ3YW4tbGVhZGVyc2hpcC1jaGFuZ2U/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAxMzAwMTQ3MjU=],
who left to head the Institute for the Study of Race, Stratification
and Political Economy at the New School in New York. He is best known
for being one of the developers of the “baby bonds
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21952&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9raXJ3YW5pbnN0aXR1dGUub3N1LmVkdS9tZWRpYS1yZWxlYXNlcy9raXJ3YW4tbGVhZGVyc2hpcC1jaGFuZ2Vd4oCdP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1
proposal in which the government provides a trust fund for every
newborn based on parents’ wealth. Hamilton was an advisor to the
Bernie Sanders campaign and a member of the Biden-Sanders Unity Task
Force. OSU paid him $259,334.40 annually
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21953&F=T&]
to
run the Kirwan Institute for the Study of Race and Ethnicity. Other
individuals associated with the institute include Kyle Strickland, who
serves as senior legal analyst and Hasan Jeffries, an OSU professor
who achieved notoriety for posting on social media that the Fraternal
Order of Police has killed more
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21954&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yYWRpby53b3N1Lm9yZy9wb3N0L3BvbGljZS11bmlvbi1vYmplY3RzLXNjaG9vbC12aXNpdC1vaGlvLXN0YXRlLXByb2Zlc3NvciNzdHJlYW0vMD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
black people than the white supremacist hate group Ku Klux Klan.
Strickland is a Black Lives Matter supporter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21955&F=T&]
who
is also deputy director of race and democracy at the Roosevelt
Institute, which received more than $1 million from OSF in 2019 and
lists Jonathan Soros as a senior fellow
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21956&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yb29zZXZlbHRpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL2F1dGhvcnMvam9uYXRoYW4tc29yb3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1].

The Kirwan Institute has received an undisclosed amount of funding
from OSF and the Soros conglomerate is listed as a financial supporter
in its 2015-2016 Biennial Report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21957&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tpcndhbmluc3RpdHV0ZS5vc3UuZWR1L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE3LzA2LzE1LTE2LUtpcndhbi1iaWVubmlhbC1yZXBvcnQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMTMwMDE0NzI1].
OSF is not specifically mentioned in the 2020 annual report. However,
it notes that the institute partners with Demos, the Roosevelt
Institute, the Center for Community Change, and the Economic Security
Project, all of which receive extensive funding from OSF. One of the
institute’s partners, PolicyLink, is a liberal research and advocacy
nonprofit in Oakland that received $500,000 from OSF in 2019.

The mayor of L.A., Eric Garcetti, claims the goal of enlisting this
group is to “advance racial equity across city government.”
Garcetti recently issued a directive
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52752&L=21958&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGFtYXlvci5vcmcvc2l0ZXMvZy9maWxlcy93cGg0NDYvZi9wYWdlL2ZpbGUvTWF5b3JHYXJjZXR0aUV4ZWN1dGl2ZURpcmVjdGl2ZTI3LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDEzMDAxNDcyNQ==]
that creates a racial equity task force and appoints racial equity
officers throughout city government. “Our city is in pain, and we
are hungry for change,” the mayor writes in the order “The
demonstrations for racial justice in recent weeks have not exposed
something new — they’ve laid bare the urgent and overdue demand to
end structural racism.
America’s tragic history of violent and persistent discrimination
casts a long shadow over the challenges Blacks and other people of
color confront today in housing, employment, and the criminal justice
system.” The social, economic, and political inequities have created
a “shamefully disparate and stratified society,” Garcetti asserts.

Until next week ...

clean_body: Clinton Emails and the Supreme Court [INSIDE JW] AMERICA NEEDS TO KNOW THE TRUTH ABOUT BIDEN FAMILY'S CORRUPTION [==] The Biden scandals didn’t disappear when Joe Biden entered the Oval Office, as I wrote [==] in this op-ed for The Washington Times: A president takes office amidst charges of family corruption and shady business dealings with a country connected to interfering in the very election that put him in the White House. Sound familiar? The false narrative that Democrats concocted to hobble the Trump administration four years ago is now the real deal with Joe Biden [==] and his family. And unlike President Trump [==], who faced unprecedented institutional resistance and Deep State resistance, President Biden [==] can likely count on the Justice Department [==] and the media to allow him to escape meaningful scrutiny. Judicial Watch recently started a petition at Change.org asking the Department of Justice [==] immediately to appoint a special counsel to investigate Biden [==] family dealings in China [], Ukraine and other countries. There is substantial evidence, from documents and witness statements, that the Biden [==] family, including President Joe Biden [==], may have been involved in criminal activity with foreign entities tied to Ukraine and China []. In just a few days the petition has garnered nearly 200,000 signatures. Judicial Watch uncovered documents that show even as far back as the Obama administration Russia-linked media in Ukraine were “trolling” Joe Biden [==] over “his son’s business.” Mr. Biden’s son Hunter has acknowledged that he is the target of an FBI criminal investigation. Any investigation should involve alleged money laundering, influence peddling and tax violations among other shady activities. A special counsel is required because the Justice Department [==] and its FBI are conflicted in investigating any matters that could implicate the president and/or his immediate family in criminal activity. As Republican Sen. Tom Cotton of Arkansas said recently, “if there were ever circumstances that create a conflict of interest and call for a special counsel, that’s here.” Justice Department [==] regulations that were abused to appoint a special counsel to harass then-President Trump [==] actually do fairly apply to the Biden situation. A special counsel is required by Justice regulations when: (a) That investigation or prosecution of that person or matter by a United States Attorney’s Office or litigating Division of the Department of Justice [==] would present a conflict of interest for the Department [==] or other extraordinary circumstances; and (b) That under the circumstances, it would be in the public interest to appoint an outside Special Counsel to assume responsibility for the matter. The matter is urgent. Americans just learned that communist China [] was actively involved in the 2020 presidential election. Director of National Intelligence John Ratcliffe, in a letter transmitted to Congress, concluded that “based on all available sources of intelligence, with definitions consistently applied, and reached independent of political considerations or undue pressure — that the People’s Republic of China sought to influence the 2020 U.S. federal elections.” Chinese efforts to interfere in the 2020 election might have been better known before election days but for Deep State resistance. Intelligence Community Ombudsman Barry Zulauf found that CIA analysts were reluctant to reveal China’s [] malign actions because they were opposed to the Trump administration, and were “saying in effect, I don’t want our intelligence used to support those policies.” In fact, “strong efforts” were made last summer to suppress analysts who wanted to expose the full range of Chinese efforts to swing the election to Mr. Biden. We are already seeing China [] indirectly benefitting from Biden policies. Cancelling the Keystone XL pipeline will divert Canadian oil west to the petroleum-hungry People’s Republic. Re-entering the Paris Climate Agreement gives political cover to China’s [] excessively polluting dirty coal industry, in which Hunter Biden is heavily invested. Mr. Biden’s State Department on Day One removed a page on its web site that contained a comprehensive assessment of the threats [] China poses to the U.S. and its allies, and an emboldened Beijing slapped outrageous sanctions on outgoing Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and 27 other former Trump [==] officials. Does China [] have corrupt leverage over President Biden [ Given the years of investigations costing millions of dollars to delve into fake Russia collusion accusations against Trump [==] world, the American people deserve to know what China [] was up to with Joe Biden [==], especially when Beijing had already shelled out millions of dollars to Biden [==] family members — including millions in set-asides for “the big guy.” What else is on that infamous Hunter Biden laptop? The conflicted Biden Justice Department [==] cannot be trusted to engage in any meaningful oversight on this issue. We need a special counsel now. SENATOR ASKS IRS TO STRIP CONSERVATIVE GROUP OF NONPROFIT STATUS One of the scandals of the Obama administration thrown down the memory hole was the use of the IRS to target political opponents. Not surprisingly, that tactic is coming back in the administration of Obama’s underling. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details [] of this renewed misuse of the IRS: Reminiscent of the Obama Internal Revenue Service’s (IRS) witch hunt of conservative groups, a U.S. Senator who sits on the committee that oversees the tax agency is pushing it to revoke a student charity’s nonprofit status. The veteran lawmaker, Rhode Island Democrat Sheldon Whitehouse, says the conservative student organization, Turning Point USA [==], should lose its nonprofit rating because it held large events that could help spread COVID-19. In a letter [==] to IRS Commissioner Charles P. Rettig the senator describes the gatherings as “superspreader” events. He specifically mentions a Palm Beach, Florida winter gala at the Mar-a-Lago Club famously owned by former President Donald Trump. “According to press reports and social media posts, many participants gathered and mingled indoors without wearing masks, in violation of Palm Beach County’s COVID-19 regulations,” Whitehouse, a member of the Senate Finance Committee [=], writes to the IRS chief. The powerful chamber has oversight over the IRS, among many other government agencies. “In holding these ‘superspreader’ events, Turning Point USA knowingly exposed hundreds of young people and staff working at the events to serious risk of infection,” the letter continues. The legislator asks the IRS to review whether the group, which has more than 250,000 student members, should continue to enjoy its tax-exempt nonprofit status. “Established law has long held that an organization is not eligible for tax exemption under section 501(c)(3) if a purpose of the organization is contrary to public policy or is illegal,” the letter states, reminding the IRS commissioner of a three-part test established to determine whether an organization’s activities are consistent with tax exemption under the code. The analysis includes determining whether the purpose of the organization is charitable, if activities are not illegal and whether the activities are in furtherance to the group’s exempt purpose and are reasonably related to that purpose. “Turning Point USA’s reckless decision to host potential ‘superspreader’ events, in open violation of local COVID-19 regulations, put children and others at risk, and was clearly contrary to the public good,” the senator tells the IRS commissioner. “Tax-exempt status provides a substantial benefit to charitable organizations and reflects the federal government’s endorsement of an organization’s activities. Organizations that knowingly put in danger minors entrusted to their care should not enjoy the benefits of tax-exempt status. Accordingly, I urge the IRS to review whether it should revoke Turning Point USA’s tax-exempt status.” Founded in 2012, Turning Point USA describes itself as a national student movement dedicated to identifying, organizing, and empowering young people to promote the principles of free markets and limited government. The group’s founder, 27-year-old Charlie Kirk, was the chairman of Students for Trump, which aimed to activate a million new college voters before the 2020 presidential election. In a press release [=] announcing the letter to the IRS, Whitehouse refers to the group as a “right-wing nonprofit” that “promotes far-right ideas to young people around the country.” The document, posted on the senator’s official website, further states that Turning Point USA “has cultivated close ties to President Trump and the Trump family.” The senator’s push to repeal the conservative charity’s nonprofit status brings back memories of the Obama IRS singling out groups with conservative-sounding terms such as “patriot” and “Tea Party” in their titles when applying for tax-exempt benefits. Judicial Watch launched an investigation and sued [==] for records after an explosive Treasury Inspector General report [==] revealed that in 2010 the IRS began using inappropriate criteria, such as lists of past and future donors, to identify organizations applying for tax-exempt status. The illegal IRS reviews continued for more than 18 months, according to the report, and “delayed processing of targeted groups’ applications” preparing for the 2012 presidential election. The IRS director at the center of the scheme, Lois Lerner, not only broke agency rules—as well as the law—to target conservative organizations she also lied to Congress to cover up the wrongdoing. BALLOT HARVESTING LEGAL BATTLE: JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO UPHOLD ARIZONA’S ELECTORAL INTEGRITY LAWS The legal battles for clean and fair elections continue – and Judicial Watch is front and center advocating for election integrity. We joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) in filing an amici curiae (friends of the court) brief [] with the U.S. Supreme Court to uphold Arizona’s electoral integrity laws that prohibit out-of-precinct voting and ballot harvesting. We submitted the brief in the case Mark Brnovich, Attorney General of Arizona, et al. v. Democratic National Committee, et al. [=] (Nos. 19-1257 & 1258), coming on appeal from the U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit. Initially, a Ninth Circuit panel of judges affirmed the district court ruling upholding Arizona’s election integrity laws that prohibit out-of-precinct voting and ballot harvesting, but then the full appeals court overturned the district court ruling. The Ninth Circuit held that Arizona’s prohibition on out-of-precinct voting and third-party collection and delivery of early ballots (ballot harvesting) were enacted with a discriminatory purpose and had discriminatory results, in violation of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act (VRA). The Supreme Court granted a writ of certiorari to hear the appeal on April 27, 2020. Our brief explains that in applying the Voting Rights Act: [C]ourts ask whether the evidence indicates that the challenged voting procedures have caused minority voters to have less opportunity to participate in the political process and to elect representatives of their choice. Respondents utterly failed to adduce any evidence that satisfied this ... requirement of causation, i.e., that the challenged voting procedure caused minorities to have less opportunity to participate in the political process and to elect representatives of their choice. This Supreme Court case highlights how leftist partisans would misuse civil rights laws to undermine election integrity measures, such as a ban on ballot harvesting, that are race neutral. In 2020, we sued North Carolina [], Pennsylvania [], and Colorado [] for failing to clean their voter rolls, and sued Illinois [] for refusing to disclose voter roll data in violation of federal law. These lawsuits are ongoing. We also have several dozen open records requests pending over the conduct of the 2020 election. You can learn more about our clean election efforts here []. JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO REQUIRE CLINTON EMAIL TESTIMONY The Clinton email scandal is one of the most dramatic illustrations of the two-tiered justice system here in Washington, DC. If it weren’t for Judicial Watch, the scandal would have been completely suppressed by the corrupt Justice and State Departments. We just asked the U.S. Supreme Court to take up our challenge [=] to an appeals court order exempting Hillary Clinton from testifying under oath about her emails. We argue in our petition for a writ of certiorari (“cert petition”) that the court should hear our case because the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit erred in giving Clinton unwarranted special treatment that conflicts both with Supreme Court precedent and the precedents of other courts of appeal, including its own. This cert petition arises from our FOIA lawsuit [] (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State [=] (No. 1:14-cv-01242), which led directly [==] to the disclosure of Clinton’s use of a nongovernment email server to conduct government business. On March 2, 2020, U.S. District Court Judge Royce Lamberth authorized [==] us to depose Clinton about her emails and the existence of relevant Benghazi attack documents. The court also ordered [==] the deposition of Clinton’s former Chief of Staff, Cheryl Mills, and two other State Department officials. Clinton and Mills filed an emergency writ of mandamus appeal to avoid testifying. On August 31, 2020, the D.C. Court of Appeals granted Clinton’s petition for mandamus relief, allowing her to avoid giving sworn testimony in our lawsuit [=]. As we argue in our cert petition, granting Clinton this extraordinary relief flies in the face of the D.C. Circuit’s own precedent, most recently in the Michael Flynn case, who, unlike Clinton, was denied mandamus relief. We also argue that the appellate decision allowing Hillary Clinton to avoid testimony dramatically undermines the Freedom of Information Act: In effect, it eliminates any discovery into the actions of agency officials or employees other than FOIA officers – walling off from any inquiry officials or employees who may be less than honest with FOIA officers or who might seek to conceal agency records from FOIA officers to prevent disclosure to the public, among other matters plainly relevant to an agency’s good faith in responding to FOIA requests. It is especially important that this misapplication of longstanding precedent be corrected because the D.C. Circuit’s far-reaching decision will nullify the “citizens’ right to be informed about ‘what their government is up to’” and for all intents and purposes, it will eradicate the district courts’ role as the enforcement arm of FOIA, as Congress intended. No court should undermine the Freedom of Information Act and the rule of law by giving Hillary Clinton special protection from having to testify about her emails. The Supreme Court should cast politics aside and affirm that Hillary Clinton is not above the law. SOROS-FUNDED GROUP TO PROVIDE ‘MANDATORY IMPLICIT BIAS TRAINING’ FOR L.A. CITY WORKERS California has become a playground for radical leftists. Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [==] their latest schemes to undermine the rule of law: Billionaire George Soros’s radical leftism is spreading through America’s most populous county. Days after a Soros-backed prosecutor [=] who vows to lock up fewer criminals became Los Angeles District Attorney, the city’s mayor is forcing all employees to undergo “implicit bias [== training to be conducted by a group that receives funding from Soros and his Open Society Foundations (OSF). That makes L.A. County and its biggest city, the nation’s second-most populous, a stronghold of the powerful Soros machine that aims to promote the left’s agenda. It started with Soros’s financial support for a controversial Black Lives Matter-endorsed District Attorney candidate, George Gascon, who has alienated career prosecutors throughout California with his renegade criminal justice reform initiatives. A former San Francisco District Attorney, Gascon announced upon being sworn in as L.A. County’s top prosecutor that his office will no longer pursue the death penalty, try juveniles as adults, add gangs and other enhancements to criminal complaints or seek cash bail for non-violent felonies or misdemeanors. It is worth noting that the L.A. County D.A. is the largest local prosecutorial office in the United States. The District Attorney in Sacramento recently blasted Gascon in a letter [=] published by various media outlets in the state. “Your Special Directives are not just extreme but will undoubtedly wreak havoc on crime victims and their Constitutional rights,” the letter states. “Your lack of concern for their rights and safety concerns me greatly. Additionally, because crime has no boundaries, these Special Directives will have far greater impact than on Los Angeles County alone. Rather, victims across California will be negatively impacted and the safety of all Californians will be jeopardized.” Now all the city’s 50,000 employees must participate in racial bias training conducted by the Kirwan Institute for the Study of Race and Ethnicity [=] at Ohio State University (OSU). Judicial Watch dug up information on the group and uncovered deep ties to Soros and other notorious leftists. The center is named after a former OSU president appointed [==] by California Congresswoman Nancy Pelosi to a prestigious Department of Education post. In addition to its “implicit bias” trainings, the institute’s research areas include racial wealth inequality, opportunity mapping, and health equity and disparities. As you would expect, its agenda is radically progressive. Policy proposals from Kirwan Institute products include, “significantly raise taxes on the ultra-wealthy,” a Congressional committee on reparations, guaranteed employment, and “Medicare for All.” Until this month, the institute’s executive director was Darrick Hamilton [=], who left to head the Institute for the Study of Race, Stratification and Political Economy at the New School in New York. He is best known for being one of the developers of the “baby bonds [ proposal in which the government provides a trust fund for every newborn based on parents’ wealth. Hamilton was an advisor to the Bernie Sanders campaign and a member of the Biden-Sanders Unity Task Force. OSU paid him $259,334.40 annually [==] to run the Kirwan Institute for the Study of Race and Ethnicity. Other individuals associated with the institute include Kyle Strickland, who serves as senior legal analyst and Hasan Jeffries, an OSU professor who achieved notoriety for posting on social media that the Fraternal Order of Police has killed more [==] black people than the white supremacist hate group Ku Klux Klan. Strickland is a Black Lives Matter supporter [=] who is also deputy director of race and democracy at the Roosevelt Institute, which received more than $1 million from OSF in 2019 and lists Jonathan Soros as a senior fellow []. The Kirwan Institute has received an undisclosed amount of funding from OSF and the Soros conglomerate is listed as a financial supporter in its 2015-2016 Biennial Report []. OSF is not specifically mentioned in the 2020 annual report. However, it notes that the institute partners with Demos, the Roosevelt Institute, the Center for Community Change, and the Economic Security Project, all of which receive extensive funding from OSF. One of the institute’s partners, PolicyLink, is a liberal research and advocacy nonprofit in Oakland that received $500,000 from OSF in 2019. The mayor of L.A., Eric Garcetti, claims the goal of enlisting this group is to “advance racial equity across city government.” Garcetti recently issued a directive [==] that creates a racial equity task force and appoints racial equity officers throughout city government. “Our city is in pain, and we are hungry for change,” the mayor writes in the order “The demonstrations for racial justice in recent weeks have not exposed something new — they’ve laid bare the urgent and overdue demand to end structural racism. America’s tragic history of violent and persistent discrimination casts a long shadow over the challenges Blacks and other people of color confront today in housing, employment, and the criminal justice system.” The social, economic, and political inequities have created a “shamefully disparate and stratified society,” Garcetti asserts. Until next week ... body:
The need for reform in Washington has never been greater, and I have a solution. Read more >>
Dear Peter, The need for reform in Washington is greater than ever, and Kevin has a plan. Did you see his earlier email about his Roadmap to Reform? He asked us to forward it just in case you missed it the first time. Keep scrolling to read it in full. The bottom line is that we need measures in place to stop the rampant corruption in DC. Things like term limits and giving Congress members enough time to actually read the legislation they’re voting on will go a LONG WAY to restoring sanity in our political system. This is just one of the many commonsense solutions Kevin is working on in Congress. We cannot continue down this path of self-destruction. It’s up to conservatives like you to fight back before it’s too late. Kevin is fighting hard for you, Peter, but he needs your help. We need to raise $3,840 more before Sunday night at MIDNIGHT to hit our first major fundraising goal of 2021. It’s so important that we send a strong message to the radical left that they cannot continue to get away with pushing their radical agenda! **[<< CHIP IN NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/5a35bea055809138c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** The Dems think they have all the power in Washington right now, but the real power lies with the people. Let’s take a stand for sanity in Washington, and all of America. Thanks,
Team Hern | |
---
From: Kevin Hern <[info@hernforcongress.com](mailto:info@hernforcongress.com "mailto:info@hernforcongress.com")>
Date: Thursday, January 28, 2021 at 2:40 PM
To: All Supporters
Subject: The Swamp Monsters don’t like this at all
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/1f5a0942f24f703ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)
Dear Peter,

**We need reform in Washington, and we need it NOW.**

That’s why I introduced legislation on Capitol Hill this week to hopefully change the way we do things around here – for the better. We need transparency and accountability, and I believe that the Roadmap to Congressional Reform is the best first step we can take.

Trust in Congress is at historic lows, but I know that we can do better for the American people. By implementing important reforms like term limits and eliminating earmarks, we’re going to go a long way towards ending the appearance of corruption that plagues us and causes many to label DC a swamp.

The Roadmap also includes measures to restrict pay and recess before a Congressional budget is passed in a timely manner, stop the Revolving Doors Act, and requires that there be time to read every bill before it’s voted on.

It’s hard to believe these commonsense practices aren’t already in place!

I’m working hard to find solutions to the problems Americans face every day. Will you please help me by making a donation today?
[**CHIP IN $5 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/6dda635a6314c39ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $10 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/7f37c1d7886a5871c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $20 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/96d899bf250ab66cc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $50 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/892b288e647132e5c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
[**CHIP IN $100 TO REFORM CONGRESS >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/7a40ebfd14209879c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
The politicians in Washington have let down the public too many times, and we have to stop rewarding them for their failures. Let’s make elected officials work for their constituents again — the way it has always been meant to be.

Thanks for your support,

Kevin Hern
[**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/a75960c0033fb28e/63cc4795ae3cfccac3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I Stand With The President On Climate Change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
Friend,

Last week, the President made the right decision to recommit the United States to the Paris Climate Agreement. As you know, this is an unprecedented time of global climate change. Scientists fear that if we don’t take bold cooperative action as soon as possible, it will have terrible consequences for our planet, wildlife, ecosystems, and human health for generations to come.

This debate isn’t just about one country or the next, it’s about the future of our planet - it’s about our children and our grandchildren. We must come together to solve these problems. It takes intelligent and moral leadership to push our country in the right direction of more sustainable energy, transportation, and jobs. We can have a vibrant and diverse economy, while at the same time protecting our planet for future generations. I am confident in the progress we will make during the Biden-Harris administration, and I’m proud to join them in that fight!

Can I count on you to chip in to help me continue to push for green policies here in Arizona and for our country?

Thank you for your support,
-- Greg

------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
------------------------------------------

Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/h2V31YG_txWInjpjo00kskzfrCeLOeCqRYdt_t214V0=/gWhbXYsflwfF_BN8wONSO02B56Rc3ZNEh7JrrKQSSSQ=.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: urgency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Your financial support allows me to focus on the work that matters.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before the end of this month. My team has set a goal to raise $10,000 before tomorrow at midnight.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-january-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424755/270665179/-1334096792?refcode2=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=)**).
It has been less than a month since I was sworn into the 117th Congress, but already my experience is unlike anything I could have imagined. On my fourth day, my colleagues and I were under siege by a mob of white supremacist terrorists, who were incited by then-President Donald Trump.
This week, a journalist at _Politico_ asked me how the historic nature of being the first openly gay Black member of Congress influences my work. I told him that it gives me a lens through which I can see how the policies we debate in Congress impact marginalized communities like the ones to which I belong, and a deep sense of urgency to change the status quo.
I told him that it’s no coincidence I was among the first members of Congress to call for the second impeachment of Donald Trump, having been under attack by a mob of white nationalist terrorists who felt threatened by my very existence. When your very existence is under attack, vague, hypothetical notions of “unity” are not top of mind.
I understood from the outset of the attempted coup that if we failed to hold Donald Trump and his co-conspirators in Congress accountable for their actions, we would find ourselves under attack again. If we fail to bar this twice-impeached ex-President from ever running for office again, the assault on our democracy, on communities of color, and on the LGBTQ+ community will continue.
I will not stop pushing for accountability from all who had a role in the events of January 6th. I am proud to co-sponsor Congresswoman Cori Bush’s resolution to investigate and expel those Members of Congress who incited the insurrection.
We also have other critical work ahead. We must crush the coronavirus pandemic and send much-needed economic relief to working families. We must save the planet from climate catastrophe while creating millions of green jobs. We must deliver health care to everyone.
**[Your financial support allows me to focus on the work that matters instead of worrying about fundraising for re-election during next year’s redistricting. If you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $10,000 goal and allow me to be the progressive champion you expect me to be during these difficult months ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424756/270665180/-1334096792?refcode2=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=)**
Thank you for your continued support. Our fight has only just begun, and your donation of any amount is a real assertion of power. When we report our fundraising numbers, any potential opponent will see that this movement is here to stay.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424757/270665181/-1334096792?refcode2=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=)**
* * *
[Website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424758/270665182/-6145312?refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=&emci=aee4cf14-1f63-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896) | [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424762/270665183/1405969458?refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=&emci=aee4cf14-1f63-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896) | [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424764/270665188/660234743?refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=&emci=aee4cf14-1f63-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896) | [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24424768/270665191/24960265?refcode=em210130-1-rem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmEwN2VkNi0yMDYzLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OBbVPak8jwnEkMJNy8T_t7MdQ2MOKDes-m_4Tvi5k=&emci=aee4cf14-1f63-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=ffa07ed6-2063-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=24719896)

subject: Opportunity

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

The Republican party is more fractured than ever in this country. After the shameful attack on our Capitol, the GOP has been left fragmented and in disarray. This is an opportunity for Democrats to come together across the country and work towards a Blue 2022.
The WVDP is digging in early, trying to raise the resources we need to register new voters, and recruit and train the best candidates. We’ve already started, but we need help. We are $1,790 away from January’s fundraising goal, and only have until midnight tomorrow to reach it.
Will you help? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP
