name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | Here's What We Know | 1.30.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3886)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | THE WORK AHEAD
---
| |
It has not yet been thirty days since the 117th Congress began, and not even ten since the Biden administration was inaugurated. Across the country newly reshuffled state legislatures are just getting underway, and yet we can already see how much work there is yet to do.

So, here's what we know right now. We're looking at:

* [H.R.1](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjElM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIySC5SLiUyQjElMjUyMiUyNTVEJTI1N0QlMjZzJTNEMyUyNnIlM0Qx&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3904) This is the #1 bill in play right now. H.R. 1 will fundamentally transform elections; federalizing operations and oversight as never before. It forces states to adopt things like same-day registration, establishes mass mail ballots, cripples state voter ID standards, limits voter roll maintenance, and expands voter harvesting (which, for the record, we are going to begin referring to as vote trafficking, because that's what it is. It's the predatory practice of exploiting vulnerable communities and stealing their votes. Vote Trafficking). There’s not a partner bill in the Senate yet, but it’s sure to come soon.
* [S. 51](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/senate-bill/51?q=%7B%22search%22%3A%22HR+51%22%7Damp;s=8amp;r=2&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3905) and [H.R.51](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjUxJTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMkguUi4lMkI1MSUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0QyJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3906) \- Senate and House versions of the Washington, D.C. Statehood Admission Act ... to make Washington, DC a state. (it's rare that Senate and House bill numbers match, but this bill would make DC the 51st state, so they matched the numbers for symbolic effect...)
* [S.136](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/senate-bill/136?q=%7B%22search%22%3A%22election%22%7Damp;s=5amp;r=6&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3907) and [H.R.237](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjIzNyUzRnElM0QlMjU3QiUyNTIyc2VhcmNoJTI1MjIlMjUzQSUyNTVCJTI1MjJILlIuJTJCMjM3JTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDElMjZyJTNEMQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3908) \- Senate and House versions of a "Vote at Home" Act(s) both to amend the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to allow all eligible voters to vote by mail in Federal elections, standardize ballot dropboxes, amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 to provide for automatic voter registration. The [National Vote at Home Institute](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ2b3RlYXRob21lLm9yZyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3909) has been working these bills hard on the Hill (and they started long before COVID...like all these bills, what's in them has been a long time in the making...)
* [H.J.Res.14](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2Utam9pbnQtcmVzb2x1dGlvbiUyRjE0JTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMkguSi4lMkJSRVMlMkIxNCUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0Q0JTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3910) \- Proposes an amendment to the Constitution of the United States to abolish the electoral college and to provide for the direct election of the President and Vice President of the United States (aka [National Popular Vote](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubmF0aW9uYWxwb3B1bGFydm90ZS5jb20lMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3911) aka mob rule)

On the radar from the 116th and almost sure to reappear in the 117th...

* Last session's [H.R. 4](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjQlM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIyaHI0JTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDEwJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3912) and[ S.4263](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGc2VuYXRlLWJpbGwlMkY0MjYzJTNGcSUzRCUyNTdCJTI1MjJzZWFyY2glMjUyMiUyNTNBJTI1NUIlMjUyMlMuNDI2MyUyNTIyJTI1NUQlMjU3RCUyNnMlM0QyJTI2ciUzRDE=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3913), the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which hasn't been reintroduced in the 117th yet, but it most assuredly will. Here's a take on the bill from the [Human Rights Campaign](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuaHJjLm9yZyUyRnJlc291cmNlcyUyRnZvdGluZy1yaWdodHMtYWR2YW5jZW1lbnQtYWN0&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3914), discussing their position that Voter ID is a form of suppression to the LGBTQ community because transgender voters do not have ID that accurately reflects their gender (yes, you read that correctly).News Flash: gender isn’t a qualification to vote. Voter ID presents no suppressive intent to the transgender, or any other, community. The U.S. is the only industrialized country in the world that does not require a standardized form of Voter ID.
* Last session's [H.R.4901](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExNnRoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjQ5MDElM0ZxJTNEJTI1N0IlMjUyMnNlYXJjaCUyNTIyJTI1M0ElMjU1QiUyNTIySFIlMkI0OTAxJTI1MjIlMjU1RCUyNTdEJTI2cyUzRDUlMjZyJTNEMg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3915) \- Puerto Rico Statehood Admission Act...making Puerto Rico a state, too.

There are other bills, like [H.R. 322](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292JTJGYmlsbCUyRjExN3RoLWNvbmdyZXNzJTJGaG91c2UtYmlsbCUyRjMyMiUyRnRleHQ=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3916), a bill put forward by Rep. Jim Banks, a Republican from Indiana, to amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 and the Help America Vote Act of 2002 to promote integrity in voter registration, the casting of ballots, the tabulation of ballots in elections for Federal office, and other integrity-focused reforms. It is highly unlikely anything like this would pass, but the drafting of these bills is important because it keeps aglow an ember of the election integrity debate that must occur if we are to find our way back to free and fair elections.

We will work hard to keep TTVers apprised of these and other bills, but for those who are interested, check out [ Congress.gov ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cCUzQSUyRiUyRmNvbmdyZXNzLmdvdiUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3917) and set up bill trackings so they can see the bills, track changes, and get familiar with the landscape. Download the bills as PDFs, word search them, ask your representatives about them, [ask us](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZjb250YWN0JTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3918). And check out what's happening with election reform in [your own state](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkYlMjNtYXA=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3919).

Meanwhile, we are still working on opportunities to open up research projects, open source what we're finding and crowdsource solutions, while still fighting in court to stop the intimidation tactics of Stacy Abrams' Fair Fight Action (see [True the Vote v. Fair Fight Action](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3893)) and protect every citizen's right to question their government without fear of retribution.

Stay the course, fellow patriot. We are in this together.

On the January 24th episode of ABC’s This Week, host George Stephanopoulos spoke with guest Sen. Rand Paul about the results of the 2020 presidential election. The two engaged in a heated discussion, with the host demanding the Senator accede to a statement as being fact, and the Senator repeatedly asserting that such a demand was designed to impugn his character and that of everyone who believes it is important to root out fraud or abuse that may have taken place.

In the clip below, the two sides of the argument seem on the surface to be about whether or not the 2020 election was "stolen" by means of fraud or abuse.

[That is not, however, the important point in the video, which you can watch...](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZhYmNzLWdlb3JnZS1zdGVwaGFub3BvdWxvcy1hbmQtc2VuYXRvci1yYW5kLXBhdWwtc3Bhci1vdmVyLWVsZWN0aW9uLWludGVncml0eSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=365A859A20A3903)

After all that's happened, after all the hardship of the last year, let's not waste one more minute just watching. Let's start doing something about it, together. clean_body: How much have we lost because of these lockdown orders created, promoted, and praised by Democrats?... | | Peter, I know you’ve probably lost count, but we’re currently at DAY 316 of lockdowns here in New York. → 316 Days of Perpetual Unconstitutional Lockdowns! → 316 Days of Shuttered Restaurants and Bars! → 316 Days of Ever-Changing Restrictions on Small Businesses! → 316 Days of Fines, Harassment, & Shutdowns from Democrats! How much have we lost because of these UNCONSTITUTIONAL , UNSCIENTIFIC , and UNDEMOCRATIC lockdown orders created, promoted, and praised by Democrats? Democrats aren’t just taking people’s hard-earned money through taxes anymore; now they are taking away their right to make a living. Our country will never recover from these lockdowns while Democrats still control Congress. We must support local, main street-focused, Republicans who understand the average American’s struggles and then TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY! That’s why Andrew has put together the 🚨 REPUBLICAN DEFENSE FUND 🚨 to support Republicans who will stand up for our small businesses and against these unconstitutional lockdown orders! | 🚨Republican Defense Fund 🚨 Goal: $10,000 | | ---|---|--- Peter, throughout this crisis, Democrats have proven they don’t care about the average American. They have abused their power and crushed American small businesses in every corner of our great nation. Thank you, Team Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

It means leaving things to chance, and in a race as critical as this... it's simply not an option. The Left has spent $20+ million against Young. It's safe to say they will spend millions, if not tens of millions , more to unseat her. Nancy Pelosi will give it her all -- funneling endless cash into our district, spending millions on ads attacking Young's record, and dialing up her Rolodex of high dollar donors -- to flip this seat blue and grow her House Majority. == == CHIP IN BEFORE TOMORROW 'S 11:59 PM DEADLINE Young is committed to restoring responsive, common-sense leadership to Washington and providing better, brighter futures for all Americans. She's working for lower taxes, a pro-small business environment, and to get our communities the support they need to thrive. Now, it's our turn to work for her. == Together, we will defend this seat and take back the House for Republicans. It won't be easy, but if this last year has proved anything it's proved that when we work together, we can do anything. Thank you, Taylor Team Young == During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Moms Helping Moms
subject: Double your impact, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Peter,
In 2020, we were able to support 23 candidates. We could only do that **because of the support of people like you**. One of the things that we love about our work is that our candidates are forever part of the Moms in Office community, because we do more than just endorse candidates. We contribute to their campaigns, we offer mentorship sessions, and **we're there for them as people, not just candidates**.
It's a unique approach, and it's who we are. This year, we're upping our game even more, to support women in politics before they're officially candidates. And we need your help to do that. We have a generous donor who, through Sunday evening, will match donations to **double your impact**.
**[Chip in today to have your donation matched!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24429812/270685084/-2094846095?refcode=0130&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5YjQxOWE1LTM5NjMtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1OQtQmzTVfiQWcCfJJhYpnjvVUCegGrDuc4mY0vXCds=)**

Friend, I came to America in search of opportunity with the hope of a better future. Instead, I found a broken political system that was victimizing the very people it was built to serve. After watching my single mother and her small business fall prey to an unwarranted tax bill, I knew I had to fight for what's right.

Years ago, I ran for the California State Board of Equalization, the very agency that took advantage of my mother. Since then I have returned $400 million+ to taxpayers, contested higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. Now, I have the honor of serving as one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. I'm committed to creating jobs, lowering taxes, balancing the budget, and restoring common sense leadership in Washington. [**But I can't do it alone.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A8Z251cl6dCPczCjTCPN3ymic9uxXBEvtuPoi6kBPTKyhngzxKZdAXzwem84x8zsqBUJ669RbHnfk4Q1DUIdym_ecFG7kyqkqnxNkME38VqGgj0a9dKYtQ6vgE0rfX9ZcN5g95NAryavkBCoxL3_cabJIuS3IMai6BYQfAJrO7qFS8gjFPz6ea8J8hzknbOo-PSyWBMPZs8VEjIVuwXrzZmw30tWgfStBQnG0Ich-TL--xPwEqw6tKr674xwNqKwiKk6QQSLIY-mm8ztzN7ZvO5n2d8c4ydYit69Ocr2P95sCBVPn-OeX7bpy9DQNi54vLQbYfCpUqn5rVOQ4wGl5wqCbN38kEVGPU-EwWnYq_5G6FZcxEFNO6AZWZ7RJrHdGB4O9WTw_94us8X4NpWuKlLUrWci8q6FnYSz4LplK8Y=&c=2ROKodRn-N5q9IZyTxhiXlFA01UZ6S51rWEaegCCU34deoD6XU-GXQ==&ch=Nhc3vzNZqK5lbifoJQcCiTI2DRztWa6BoDWsgvCDzPxwv9cNifEjlA==)

Reaching our goal now ensures we have the resources to run ads, grow our grassroots team, and counter the millions the Left will spend trying to flip this seat blue. Falling short means leaving the fate of the House Majority to chance.

With the Democrats in control of the House, Senate, and White House, winning back the House Majority has never been more important. It's the only way to restore quick, common-sense leadership to Washington. [**Can I count on you to rush in a 300% matched donation before the clock runs out to do just that?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A8Z251cl6dCPczCjTCPN3ymic9uxXBEvtuPoi6kBPTKyhngzxKZdAXzwem84x8zsqBUJ669RbHnfk4Q1DUIdym_ecFG7kyqkqnxNkME38VqGgj0a9dKYtQ6vgE0rfX9ZcN5g95NAryavkBCoxL3_cabJIuS3IMai6BYQfAJrO7qFS8gjFPz6ea8J8hzknbOo-PSyWBMPZs8VEjIVuwXrzZmw30tWgfStBQnG0Ich-TL--xPwEqw6tKr674xwNqKwiKk6QQSLIY-mm8ztzN7ZvO5n2d8c4ydYit69Ocr2P95sCBVPn-OeX7bpy9DQNi54vLQbYfCpUqn5rVOQ4wGl5wqCbN38kEVGPU-EwWnYq_5G6FZcxEFNO6AZWZ7RJrHdGB4O9WTw_94us8X4NpWuKlLUrWci8q6FnYSz4LplK8Y=&c=2ROKodRn-N5q9IZyTxhiXlFA01UZ6S51rWEaegCCU34deoD6XU-GXQ==&ch=Nhc3vzNZqK5lbifoJQcCiTI2DRztWa6BoDWsgvCDzPxwv9cNifEjlA==)

Thank you,

clean_body: It's Michelle Steel (R-CA), %%First Name%%, and right now I need your help. We have less than 48 hours before our critical campaign deadline, and we aren't where we need to be. Can you 300% match donate to defeat Pelosi's hand-picked candidate once again? ** . == Friend. It's Michelle Steel (R-CA), Friend, and right now I need your help. We have less than 48 hours before our critical campaign deadline, and we aren't where we need to be. Can you 300% match donate to defeat Pelosi 's hand-picked candidate once more? == == == == == Friend, I came to America in search of opportunity with the hope of a better future. Instead, I found a broken political system that was victimizing the very people it was built to serve. After watching my single mother and her small business fall prey to an unwarranted tax bill, I knew I had to fight for what's right. Years ago, I ran for the California State Board of Equalization, the very agency that took advantage of my mother. Since then I have returned $400 million+ to taxpayers, contested higher taxes, and focused on fixing a broken tax system that is holding our families and businesses back. Now, I have the honor of serving as one of the first Korean-American women in Congress. I'm committed to creating jobs, lowering taxes, balancing the budget, and restoring common sense leadership in Washington. == Reaching our goal now ensures we have the resources to run ads, grow our grassroots team, and counter the millions the Left will spend trying to flip this seat blue. Falling short means leaving the fate of the House Majority to chance. With the Democrats in control of the House, Senate, and White House, winning back the House Majority has never been more important. It's the only way to restore quick, common-sense leadership to Washington. == Thank you, Michelle Steel | With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. ==** Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_z58UtDOLeqrDOXhZhbGB9k-0eRoAed9EVTMwx9pUf5E8eZh-0zi_2yOJGXkAAI8U5sMHrbDqrNOolU3MYlTRxPMX7bX-N8rsfseB_IIW4AZvergwMJ6iYAkvy9YYGZdWu5zn6TibXU=&c=1HR3XAObbUstciP5TNcKJn6xu-IG8tAw-FEowR9E99B6PxlXTPboaw==&ch=NmAp_r7O7MrBnhMNYwlPygWXvFeHIQ2hC4g2j4NOxilt2Tz9ncfg_A==).

They plan to win as many seats as possible and FLIP our state houses from RED to BLUE -- unless we take action today! Friend, Right now, Nancy Pelosi and her allies in the states are gearing up for some critical special elections. They plan to win as many seats as possible and FLIP our statehouses from RED to BLUE -- unless we take action today! As an immigrant and conservative woman , I know how important it is to be ready for the Democrats' endless attacks. That's why I believe it's so necessary to ensure our state Republicans have the resources to push back on the liberal agenda and WIN each and every special election this year. body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSwnw1ab7fqDb4v4jzPk1gptjGO1nf-ozvtJdFaqgA9kMH4A-dJZU5PrIHNccD9SZRhF0_Mluy7S59nfmN191VT890YYxpMsmyA9ZPVZyTe7RjM4aT5qakBcWAqi4wYPQgd1NguRn-AN8CLw4MLxGFpcem5DrVR7-QFellYhxH4Z9KPaOsPMrE9pomym9jIPxcW31EIiz8emAyigivy9Z5_h2LKUnJrZenD2kzRb5QfgKDosb6xlKcH8IwGUxQEjKAPdwNVo9zUTBAf65O12dvIQGD11CRAIq2FM9uw_tXwoZxc0lKEJgLRuRV3BxpYGzw/390/yGuzb_SzTDuzgDMJTuTR8g/h0/4IaShmO7r9-vZ1TA5GbUIoxBLqxpPhiV6rF7zYltRDw)
Derek, After Joe Biden’s big win in Virginia, it would be easy for Democrats to think the Governor’s race in 2021 will be a slam dunk. **But here’s why history says that’s wrong:** For nearly 50 years, Virginia has elected a Governor from the opposite party that won the White House the year before. When a Democrat wins the White House, history dictates a Republican will win Virginia's Governorship the next year. Terry is the only candidate who has broken this streak since 1973! Derek, this is going to be a very close race. And with radical Republicans like Amanda Chase and Kirk Cox threatening to turn Virginia into MAGA-land, we can’t take any chances. Terry has what it takes to defeat them, but he needs your support. **And here’s the good news:** a generous group of donors has offered to match every contribution that comes in between now and midnight tomorrow. **[This is an opportunity to donate now and double your impact -- don’t miss it!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSwnw1ab7fqDb4v4jzPk1go2ND9ym6oefiupatEQqdfe-0clca1I27ti6c6IFH6A9lQq0yB2uL77aL5uVVp51fH6LOHRWIONSHBdTRcIJWr0C-ax3b1ES15G1e1a0mxe_6pu6iy9AYyxAaDhMYnaYCWqPmu1-CLchN-oVCB-HUPOy2gU-VYv2AafWGOutkiIkk1zCRpi9HjvEviREw3YDCpjqCJuivMn78rcI1ZJHNaQticzkOqH72GPXKcxeM-5efLRBMbv_V-_o_5-PIkV1DmDMQEACkJeru2s4N0_r0N9R7fG3u9XJvIpAma6rqKN7w/390/yGuzb_SzTDuzgDMJTuTR8g/h1/-Aufrs9DRFOtzz4o0JO8u3sufdFQ1PbjxERvxdvQqHw)

Conventional wisdom in politics seldom comes true. We all expected Trump to be defeated in 2016, but he won. And the polls showed him losing by large margins in 2020, but he came too close for comfort again.
We can’t take a chance this time around. With everything at stake, we have to hold the line.

I'm the former White House Chief Medical Advisor, a retired Navy Rear Admiral, and Congressman for the MOST Conservative district in the nation. Joe Biden's only been in office for a few days now, and he's already announced that he wants to be the most liberal president in American history. Derek, **According to a**** _New York Times_****report, Trumpist extremism is running wild through state Republican parties across the country, including here in Virginia.** As someone who’s been sparring with these guys for decades, the recent right-ward trend is cause for alarm. Think about it: A decade ago, conspiracy theorist Amanda Chase wouldn’t have been the frontrunner for the Republican nomination for Governor of Virginia. A decade ago, the GOP would not have supported a deadly insurrection in the U.S. Capitol. They would not have supported QAnon disciples like Marjorie Taylor Greene or Lauren Boebert. **Derek, we have to face facts:** Amanda Chase is the face of the Virginia GOP. And her terrifying rise in the race for the Virginia Governorship is a call to action. We can’t let her anywhere near the Governor’s office. And I promise to stop her. **_But this campaign can’t work without your support._** Luckily for us, a generous group of donors have offered to match every contribution that comes in between now and midnight tomorrow. **[This is your chance to double your impact. subject: Just weeks ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Elizabeth will keep fighting for real change and laying out big plans to fix what's broken in our country. As a member of this grassroots team, you have the power to keep her voice and our movement fr | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516a/45c30650/1c5cb0d3a/66eb147e/1618806172/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We know this month has seemed so long, but remember: Just weeks ago, this grassroots team helped power Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to victory in Georgia, taking back the Senate for Democrats!

Thank you for the part you played in these victories.

When we fight side by side, we win. And now that Democrats control the House, the Senate, and the White House, we can get so much done for working people.

But with the margin so close in the Senate, Elizabeth will need our grassroots movement to fight harder than ever from the outside while she works on the inside.

**Elizabeth will keep fighting for real change and laying out big plans to fix what's broken in our country. As a member of this grassroots team, you have the power to keep her voice and our movement front and center at this critical moment.**

**[If you can, fight by Elizabeth's side by making a donation before tomorrow's fundraising deadline. Whatever you can contribute will go a long way to support her re-election campaign, help elect more Warren Democrats across the country, and grow our grassroots movement.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516a/45c30650/1c5cb0d3a/66eb1461/1618806172/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWphbjIxIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowNkZfRUdSX0VPTV9XXzIwMjEwMTMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-jan21?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMZ06F_EGR_EOM_W_20210130_V1S2_P")**

There are lots of big changes that a Biden-Harris administration can achieve through executive orders and agency action right now. Like canceling billions of dollars in student loan debt, lowering drug prices for millions, enforcing health and safety standards for COVID-19, and restoring balance and competitions by cracking down on Big Tech and runaway Wall Street hedge funds and private equity firms.

Elizabeth is going to keep up the fight to get all this done and more -- but she can't do it alone.

If we work together, if we fight together, if we persist together, we will make big, structural change together.

**[If you can make a donation at this time, please contribute to support Elizabeth's re-election campaign and help elect Democrats like her. Together, we can grow this grassroots movement. Our first fundraising deadline of 2021 is tomorrow at midnight.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516a/45c30650/1c5cb0d3a/66eb1461/1618806172/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWphbjIxIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowNkZfRUdSX0VPTV9XXzIwMjEwMTMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-jan21?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMZ06F_EGR_EOM_W_20210130_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852516a/45c30650/1c5cb0d3a/66eb1461/1618806172/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWphbjIxIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVowNkZfRUdSX0VPTV9XXzIwMjEwMTMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-jan21?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMZ06F_EGR_EOM_W_20210130_V1S2_P")

**According to a**** _New York Times_****report, Trumpist extremism is running wild through state Republican parties across the country, including here in Virginia.**

clean_body: | | | Derek, Gwen Rocco here, Deputy Campaign Manager for Terry McAuliffe’s campaign for Governor of Virginia. I’m writing to follow up on Terry’s note from earlier this afternoon. We have a right-wing conspiracy theorist in Amanda Chase barrelling toward the GOP nomination for the Virginia Governorship. Terry is committed to stopping her, but it’s our job to help him. Luckily for us, generous donors have agreed to match all donations that come in before the end of the month. Now is your chance to watch your dollar go twice as far. | Your support means the world to us. Thank you, Gwen Rocco Deputy Campaign Manager, Terry for Virginia \--------Begin forwarded message \-------- Derek, According to a New York Timesreport, Trumpist extremism is running wild through state Republican parties across the country, including here in Virginia. As someone who’s been sparring with these guys for decades, the recent right-ward trend is cause for alarm. Think about it: A decade ago, conspiracy theorist Amanda Chase wouldn’t have been the frontrunner for the Republican nomination for Governor of Virginia. A decade ago, the GOP would not have supported a deadly insurrection in the U.S. Capitol. They would not have supported QAnon disciples like Marjorie Taylor Greene or Lauren Boebert. Derek, we have to face facts: Amanda Chase is the face of the Virginia GOP. And her terrifying rise in the race for the Virginia Governorship is a call to action. We can’t let her anywhere near the Governor’s office. And I promise to stop her. But this campaign can’t work without your support. Luckily for us, a generous group of donors have offered to match every contribution that comes in between now and midnight tomorrow. **** | | | | Like you, I’ve had friends and family on both sides of the aisle. But today’s GOP is a bridge too far. We need to stop them in their tracks. Thank you for helping me fight back, Terry McAuliffe Paid for by Terry for Virginia | | Sent via .
